sentence: 走廊的照明太暗，容易摔跤。
pinyin: Zǒuláng de zhàomíng tài àn, róngyì shuāijiāo.
english: The hallway lighting is too dim and it's easy to trip.

meaning: 1. to last; 2. to take (time); 3. period; 4. diachronic
sentence: 这栋大楼的建设历时三年终于完工了。
pinyin: Zhè dòng dàlóu de jiànshè lìshí sān nián zhōngyú wángōng le.
english: The construction of this building took three years and is finally complete.

meaning: 1. to formulate; 2. enunciation; 3. to explain sth precisely
sentence: 他把自己的想法清楚地表述出来了。
pinyin: Tā bǎ zìjǐ de xiǎngfǎ qīngchǔ de biǎoshù chūlái le.

sentence: 几位富豪联手投资了这个项目。
pinyin: Jǐ wèi fùháo liánshǒu tóuzīle zhège xiàngmù.
english: Several wealthy tycoons joined hands to invest in this project.

sentence: 这项改革推进时遇到了很大阻力。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng gǎigé tuījìn shí yùdào le hěn dà zǔlì.
english: This reform faced a lot of resistance when it was being pushed forward.
